items.title: Ryanair 'reluctantly' agrees to let parents sit with children for free
items.dek: Previously, the airline had typically charged parents a fee of £8 each way to sit with their young children.
items.body: Previously, the airline had typically charged parents a fee of £8 each way to sit with their young children.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
items.dek: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.body: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Police seal off key roads in Nairobi as Kenya braces for Gen Z protests
items.dek: Protesters demand justice for more than 80 people killed during the 2024 demonstrations and last year's anniversary protests.
items.body: Protesters demand justice for more than 80 people killed during the 2024 demonstrations and last year's anniversary protests.
items.author: IriLine Desk
